global_rules.format: Native TikTok photo slideshows via ReelFarm, not video exports

automations.A: Lifestyle-only: all 5 slides lifestyle photos; every slide carries text overlay; text does the storytelling.
automations.B: Lifestyle hook + screenshots: slide 1 lifestyle hook with text overlay; slides 2-5 clean app screenshots with no overlay.

global_rules.recommendation_bar: 3-5 high-confidence recommendations max; 'nothing worth acting on today' is valid. No padding.

apps.name: Vista
apps.product: Social movie-rating app with 1-100 precision ratings, Taste Titles, and friend compatibility scoring.
apps.audience: Late-20s to 30s aesthetic-conscious viewers who watch movies socially.
apps.positioning: Movie taste as identity and social currency; Letterboxd-adjacent.
apps.voice: Warm, slightly literary, self-aware, like someone roasting their own taste at a dinner party.
strong_devices: compatibility drama with named real/neutral person framing

apps.name: Nash Satoshi
apps.product: 4-LLM crypto token analysis platform scoring tokens 0-100 across Coordination, Schelling Rank, Reflexivity, Virality, Asymmetry, and Game Theory.
apps.audience: Crypto-burned retail traders 25-40 skeptical of Crypto Twitter hype.
apps.positioning: Anti-hype token analysis framework; helps people avoid becoming exit liquidity.
apps.voice: Analytical, contrarian, dry, with attitude. No hype.
strong_devices: tier-based authority claims without specific tickers

apps.name: Glow Index
apps.product: 4-AI skincare product analysis platform scoring ingredient efficacy, value, and formulation.
apps.audience: Ingredient-literate women 22-40 skeptical of influencer marketing.
apps.positioning: Catches the gap between skincare marketing claims and chemistry.
apps.voice: Friend-spilling-secrets, slightly skeptical, specific. Not clinical, not preachy.
banned: specific aging product claims unless analytics proves evergreen
